import{useEffect,useCallback}from"react";/**
 * useLightbox
 * Handles keyboard navigation and escape-to-close for the lightbox.
 *
 * @param {object|null} current  - currently open photo (null = closed)
 * @param {Function}    onClose  - called when user presses Escape
 * @param {Function}    onPrev   - called when user presses ArrowLeft
 * @param {Function}    onNext   - called when user presses ArrowRight
 */export function useLightbox(current,onClose,onPrev,onNext){const handleKey=useCallback(e=>{if(!current)return;if(e.key==="Escape")onClose();if(e.key==="ArrowLeft")onPrev();if(e.key==="ArrowRight")onNext();},[current,onClose,onPrev,onNext]);useEffect(()=>{window.addEventListener("keydown",handleKey);return()=>window.removeEventListener("keydown",handleKey);},[handleKey]);}
